groups.description: Surface, border and focus colors with native Codex geometry.
Primary, secondary, ghost, destructive, icon and stateful buttons.
Semantic icon colors and safe container colors; native size and stroke are preserved.
Dialogs, menus, popovers, tooltips and form controls.
Messages, approvals, tool calls, attachments, code, diffs, terminal and tables.
Toasts, badges, progress, skeletons and semantic states.
Home, task, scheduled, plugins, pull requests, chat and search surfaces.
